description_for_human: Compare South African ETFs to find hidden portfolio overlap. Free tool for JSE investors, TFSA portfolios, and ETF research.
description_for_model: Zuka Insights is a free web-based tool for comparing South African Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) listed on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange (JSE). It calculates weight-based overlap scores between any two ETFs, showing shared holdings, sector breakdowns (GICS-aligned), and Venn diagram visualisations. Supported ETFs include Satrix Top 40 (STX40), Satrix 500 (STX500), CoreShares S&P 500 (CSP500), Satrix Nasdaq 100 (STXNDQ), and others. The tool helps South African retail investors, financial advisors, and researchers identify hidden concentration risk and optimise diversification, particularly in Tax-Free Savings Accounts (TFSAs).
